title: ayenia euphrasiifolia
intro: Ayenia euphrasiifolia, also known as the False Eyebright, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including treating digestive issues, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-hyperglycemic properties. Herbal preparations of Ayenia euphrasiifolia can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
